calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Certain Assets Are Trust Property And Directing Transfer Of Title Of Same To Trustee Of Trust
Off Calendar Aug-27-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Anne Asis appeared by zoom for Debbie Dawn Elizabeth Kahn (petitioner and successor trustee).

Mrs. Asis addressed the issue of notice to Capital One bank stating that she filed a second declaration on Friday, that she spoke with a Principal Legal Specialist at Capital One, and that he asked her for a copy of the proposed order and that she keep him informed of the petition. Mrs. Asis also stated that she has not heard of any objections. The court waives notice. The Petition for Order Confirming Certain Assets are Trust Property, etc. is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Certain Assets Are Trust Property And Directing Transfer Of Title Of Same To Trustee Of Trust
Off Calendar Jul-16-2024 Continued To Aug-27-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
